entities.name: Sixth City Marketing
entities.description: A data-driven digital marketing agency founded in 2010 in Westlake, Ohio, offering SEO, PPC, web design, and conversion rate optimization services focused on measurable ROI.

hasChunks.text: Your marketing strategy should be driven by real results. Since 2010 we've delivered SEO, PPC, CRO, and web design services.
hasChunks.pageTitle: An SEO Agency Focused on ROI | Data-Driven Digital Marketing

hasChunks.text: All our marketing work is customized. No one-size-fits-all approaches that are packaged to every client.
hasChunks.pageTitle: An SEO Agency Focused on ROI | Data-Driven Digital Marketing

entities.name: SEO & AI Search Services
entities.description: Search engine optimization services including keyword research, user experience testing, link building, data analysis, conversion tracking, and content writing to grow organic and AI search visibility.

hasChunks.text: Our SEO services include extensive keyword research, user experience testing, link building, data analysis, conversion tracking, and content writing.

entities.name: Search Engine Optimization
entities.description: The practice of improving a website's visibility in organic search engine results through technical, content, and authority-building work.

hasChunks.text: SEO is the process of optimizing a website so it ranks higher in organic search results, driving qualified traffic without paid placement.

entities.name: Local SEO
entities.description: Location-based search optimization that helps businesses rank in local map results and geographic searches across their service areas.

hasChunks.text: Local SEO helps your business appear in location-based and map searches so nearby customers can find you.

entities.name: Pay-Per-Click Marketing
entities.description: Paid search and advertising management across Google Ads, Shopping Ads, Bing Ads, and social platforms designed to increase ad campaign ROI.

hasChunks.text: Increase your ad campaign's ROI by getting your ads in front of your target audiences.

entities.name: Website Design & Development
entities.description: Custom website design and development on WordPress and Shopify platforms built to support search visibility and conversion goals.

hasChunks.text: We design and develop websites on WordPress and Shopify built to perform in search and convert visitors.

entities.name: Conversion Rate Optimization
entities.description: Testing and refinement of website pages and user experience to turn more existing traffic into leads and customers.

hasChunks.text: Conversion rate optimization improves the percentage of your website visitors who become leads or customers.

entities.name: Return on Investment
entities.description: A performance measure used by Sixth City Marketing as the primary benchmark for evaluating marketing campaign success.

hasChunks.text: ROI isn't just a buzzword for us; it's a benchmark.
hasChunks.pageTitle: An SEO Agency Focused on ROI | Data-Driven Digital Marketing

entities.name: Westlake, Ohio
entities.description: The headquarters location of Sixth City Marketing, in the greater Cleveland, Ohio metropolitan area.

hasChunks.text: Sixth City Marketing is headquartered at 837 Crocker Rd in Westlake, Ohio, with additional offices across the Midwest and South.
